segment.source: Please fill out all required inputs!
Please give all inputs a system name!
Are you sure you want to cancel the edit for the item ""? All changes will be lost!
Are you sure you want to log out?
This is the rendered template for .
Timestamp of when this distribution was imported. Not meaningful for manually created distros.
Computed GRUB-compatible URL for the remote initrd, derived from the Remote Boot Initrd field.
Computed GRUB-compatible URL for the remote kernel, derived from the Remote Boot Kernel field.
CPU architecture of the distribution. Determines DHCP templates and bootloader configuration syntax.
Key=value pairs substituted into the automatic installation template as variables before rendering. Supports <<inherit>>.
Extra files to copy into tftpboot in addition to the kernel and initrd. Supports <<inherit>>.
Bootloaders for which Cobbler generates PXE/GRUB boot entries. Supports <<inherit>>.
Files clients can fetch via TFTP or HTTP, specified as "name=path" pairs. Supports <<inherit>>.
Full path to the kernel image, a filename in the configured kernel directory, or a directory containing a selectable kernel.
Full path to the initrd image. The filename must follow kernel naming conventions.
URL (tftp:// or http://) to an initrd that the bootloader fetches directly.
URL (tftp:// or http://) to a kernel that the bootloader fetches directly, without storing it on the Cobbler server.
Space-delimited key=value pairs appended to the kernel command line during installation, e.g. "a=b c=d". Supports <<inherit>>.
Space-delimited key=value pairs appended to the kernel command line after installation completes. Supports <<inherit>>.
Configuration management classes (e.g. Puppet external_nodes) assigned to this distro. Supports <<inherit>>.
Distribution family (e.g. redhat, debian, suse). Controls default behaviors for most Cobbler operations.
OS release identifier validated against distro_signatures.json (e.g. rhel9, jammy). Used for OS-specific provisioning steps.
Cobbler user accounts allowed to manage this item. Cosmetic only — not validated against real users. Supports <<inherit>>.
Registration key for Red Hat management systems (Spacewalk, Uyuni, SUSE Manager). Supports <<inherit>>.
Source=destination file mappings for built-in configuration management.
Delete failed! Check server logs for more information.
When checked, this item represents a directory rather than a single file.
Action to perform on the file: "create" to create it, "remove" to delete it.
Unix group name or GID that owns the file.
Unix file permissions in octal notation, e.g. "0644" for a regular file.
Unix user name or UID that owns the file.
Absolute path where the file will be placed on the managed system.
Path to the template used to generate the file content.
Number of virtual NICs this image has. Deprecated since 3.3.0 — not used anywhere in the project.
Registration key for Red Hat management systems (Spacewalk, Uyuni, SUSE Manager). Supports <<inherit>>.
Name of the parent image for inheritance.
CPU architecture the image was built for. Enforced on physical deployments.
Path to an answer file for automated installation (e.g. a Windows SIF or kickstart). Only used when image_type is "iso".
Operating system family of the image.
Location of the image file, accessible on all nodes that need it. Format: [user@]host:/path or /local/path.
Image kind: direct (memdisk, physical only), iso (bootable ISO), virt-clone (cloned virtual disk), or memdisk (HDD image).
OS release version the image contains.
Bootloaders able to boot this image type.
Cobbler user accounts allowed to manage this item. Cosmetic only — not validated against real users. Supports <<inherit>>.
When checked, this class is a definition (abstract) and will not be directly applied to systems.
Registration key for Red Hat management systems (Spacewalk, Uyuni, SUSE Manager). Supports <<inherit>>.
The fully qualified class name as used by the configuration management system (e.g. Puppet).
Cobbler user accounts allowed to manage this item. Cosmetic only — not validated against real users. Supports <<inherit>>.
Key=value parameters passed to the management class.
File objects managed by this class.
Package objects managed by this class.
Display name shown in the PXE boot menu for this entry.
The item's name. Used as the primary identifier across the Cobbler API and CLI.
The internal unique identifier assigned by Cobbler. Never reused, even after deletion.
Timestamp of the last change to this item via the Cobbler API.
Timestamp of when this item was first created in Cobbler.
Logical depth of this item in the hierarchy. Controls load order and sorting.
Whether this item is a sub-object of another item (e.g. a sub-profile or sub-system).
A free-text note or description to associate with this item.
Options passed to the kernel bonding driver, e.g. "miimon=100 mode=1".
Options passed to the bridge driver.
Additional CNAME (alias) hostnames for this interface.
Use connected mode for InfiniBand interfaces.
VLAN tag identifying the DHCP network this interface is provisioned from.
Fully qualified hostname for this interface.
Per-interface IPv4 gateway. Overrides the system-level gateway for this interface.
Name of the bond or bridge this interface is a member of.
Interface kind: bond, bond_slave, bridge, bridge_slave, infiniband, or na (regular).
IPv4 address assigned to this interface.
IPv6 address assigned to this interface.
Maximum transmission unit size for IPv6 on this interface.
IPv6 prefix length for this interface, e.g. 64.
Additional IPv6 addresses assigned to this interface.
Static IPv6 routes assigned to this interface.
Hardware MAC address of this interface, e.g. AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF.
Mark this as the management interface (used for out-of-band access).
Maximum transmission unit size in bytes (e.g. 1500 or 9000 for jumbo frames).
IPv4 subnet mask for this interface, e.g. 255.255.255.0.
Use a static IP address rather than DHCP for this interface.
Static routes assigned to this interface in the format "network/prefix:gateway".
Virtual bridge to attach this interface to. Defaults to the global default_virt_bridge setting.
Registration key for Red Hat management systems (Spacewalk, Uyuni, SUSE Manager). Supports <<inherit>>.
Unix file permissions for the installed package files, in octal notation.
Unix user name or UID that owns the installed files.
Unix group name or GID that owns the installed files.
Template used to generate a configuration file for this package.
Action to perform: "install" to install the package, "remove" to uninstall it.
Package manager to use for installation (e.g. yum, apt).
Specific version of the package to install. Leave empty to install the latest.
Cobbler user accounts allowed to manage this item. Cosmetic only — not validated against real users. Supports <<inherit>>.
Registration key for Red Hat management systems (Spacewalk, Uyuni, SUSE Manager). Supports <<inherit>>.
Path to the automatic installation template file on the Cobbler server (e.g. /var/lib/cobbler/templates/default.ks).
VLAN tag identifying the DHCP network segment this profile's systems are provisioned from.
Name of the parent distro. Required unless this is a sub-profile.
Name of the boot menu this profile will appear in.
IPv4 address of the TFTP/next-boot server. Overrides the global setting for this profile.
IPv6 address of the TFTP/next-boot server. Overrides the global setting for this profile.
Filename fetched from the TFTP server by the client bootloader.
Name of the parent profile for sub-profile inheritance.
HTTP proxy URL used during package installation. Overrides the global proxy setting.
Hostname or IP of the Cobbler server as reachable by clients on this network. Overrides the global server setting.
Bootloaders for which Cobbler generates PXE/GRUB boot entries. Supports <<inherit>>.
Cobbler user accounts allowed to manage this item. Cosmetic only — not validated against real users. Supports <<inherit>>.
Key=value pairs substituted into the automatic installation template as variables before rendering. Supports <<inherit>>.
Extra files to copy into tftpboot in addition to the kernel and initrd. Supports <<inherit>>.
Files clients can fetch via TFTP or HTTP, specified as "name=path" pairs. Supports <<inherit>>.
Space-delimited key=value pairs appended to the kernel command line during installation, e.g. "a=b c=d". Supports <<inherit>>.
Space-delimited key=value pairs appended to the kernel command line after installation completes. Supports <<inherit>>.
Configuration management classes (e.g. Puppet external_nodes) assigned to this profile. Supports <<inherit>>.
Parameters passed to the management application as a YAML dictionary. Supports <<inherit>>.
DNS name server addresses configured on provisioned systems.
DNS search domains configured on provisioned systems.
Yum/APT repositories configured on systems after provisioning completes.
Source=destination file mappings for built-in configuration management.
Yum priority (1 = highest, 99 = default lowest). Only effective when the yum-priorities plugin is installed.
Synchronize this repository on every cobbler reposync run. Uncheck to freeze the current snapshot.
Download and store all repository content locally. Requires significant disk space.
Protocol type used for reposync (overrides the default).
URL to the upstream source to sync from (rsync, http, ftp, or yum).
Repository system family (e.g. yum, apt, rsync). Controls default reposync behavior.
OS version this repository is compatible with.
HTTP proxy URL for reaching the upstream mirror. Supports <<inherit>>.
Flags passed to createrepo, e.g. "-c cache -g comps.xml". Supports <<inherit>>.
Cobbler user accounts allowed to manage this item. Cosmetic only — not validated against real users. Supports <<inherit>>.
Debian repository sections to mirror, e.g. "main contrib non-free".
Debian distribution codenames to mirror, e.g. "bookworm bookworm-updates".
Limit the mirror to only these package names (space-separated). Leave empty to mirror everything.
Environment variables set before each reposync run, as key=value pairs.
Additional options passed to yum/dnf during reposync, as key=value pairs.
Additional options passed to rsync during reposync.
Number of vCPU cores for VMs using this system definition.
Disk image size in gigabytes for VMs.
RAM in megabytes for VMs using this system definition.
Serial port number (0, 1, …) for console access. Set to -1 to disable.
Baud rate for the serial console. Set to "disabled" to disable.
Registration key for Red Hat management systems (Spacewalk, Uyuni, SUSE Manager). Supports <<inherit>>.
Path to the automatic installation template file. Overrides the profile's template.
Name of the parent object for sub-system inheritance.
Default IPv4 gateway address for the system.
Fully qualified domain name of the system.
Name of the image to provision this system with. Cannot be set at the same time as profile.
Name of the network interface used as the default IPv6 route.
IPv4 address of the TFTP/next-boot server for this system.
IPv6 address of the TFTP/next-boot server for this system.
Filename fetched from the TFTP server by the client bootloader.
IP or hostname of the power management controller.
Port, blade ID, or outlet number on the power management device.
Password for the power management controller.
Power management type (e.g. ipmilanplus, apc, drac).
Username for the power management controller.
Additional options passed to the power management tool.
Path to the SSH identity file for power management authentication.
Name of the profile to provision this system with. Cannot be set at the same time as image.
HTTP proxy URL used during package installation. Overrides the profile setting.
Cobbler server hostname/IP as reachable by this system. Overrides the profile setting.
Provisioning status of this system (e.g. production, testing, development).
Disk driver for VM images (e.g. raw, qcow2). Supports <<inherit>>.
Filesystem path where VM disk images are stored.
Hypervisor type for VMs (e.g. kvm, xen, vmware). Supports <<inherit>>.
Bootloaders for which Cobbler generates PXE/GRUB boot entries. Supports <<inherit>>.
Use stateless address autoconfiguration (SLAAC) for IPv6 on this system.
Enable repository management for this system after provisioning.
Allow PXE boot files to be generated on sync. Disable after installation to prevent reinstall loops.
Automatically start the VM when the host boots. Supports <<inherit>>.
Boot this VM from PXE rather than from its disk.
Cobbler user accounts allowed to manage this item. Cosmetic only — not validated against real users. Supports <<inherit>>.
Extra files to copy into tftpboot in addition to the kernel and initrd. Supports <<inherit>>.
Files clients can fetch via TFTP or HTTP. Supports <<inherit>>.
Space-delimited key=value pairs appended to the kernel command line during installation. Supports <<inherit>>.
Space-delimited key=value pairs appended to the kernel command line after installation. Supports <<inherit>>.
Configuration management classes assigned to this system. Supports <<inherit>>.
Parameters passed to the management application as a YAML dictionary. Supports <<inherit>>.
Source=destination file mappings for built-in configuration management.
Key=value pairs substituted into the automatic installation template as variables. Supports <<inherit>>.
DNS name server addresses configured on this system.
DNS search domains configured on this system.
Network boot successfully disabled for system .
Disabling network boot for system was unsuccessful.
This functionality is not yet implemented.
You are not authorized to continue.
User information is not retrievable with Cobbler 3.3.x.
